task_completion.description: Verify the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset is used.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Oracle Analytics Desktop is open and 'Sample Order Lines' is visible in the data elements panel or preparation canvas.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Brand' calculated column is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A column named 'Brand' is visible in the data panel or table view, or a calculation window is open showing a formula extracting the first word from 'Product Name' and named 'Brand'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'City_Upper' calculated column is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A column named 'City_Upper' is visible in the data panel or table view showing uppercase city names, or a calculation window is open showing an UPPER() function applied to the 'City' column.

task_completion.description: Verify the data is filtered to the 'Technology' Product Category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A filter for 'Product Category' is visible in the filter bar at the top of the canvas, specifically set to include only 'Technology'.

task_completion.description: Verify a Bar Chart visualization showing 'Sales' by 'Brand' is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Bar Chart is rendered on the canvas. The grammar/properties panel should show 'Brand' assigned to the category/X-axis and 'Sales' assigned to the values/Y-axis.

task_completion.description: Verify the workbook is saved as 'Brand_Analysis.dva' in the Documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The top title bar of Oracle Analytics Desktop displays 'Brand_Analysis', or a 'Save As' dialog is visible showing the file name 'Brand_Analysis' and the location set to the Documents folder (C:\Users\Docker\Documents).

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the Oracle Analytics Desktop GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual Oracle Analytics Desktop interface being clicked and navigated, rather than terminal commands or scripts being executed to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the visualization is genuinely rendered within the BI tool.
integrity.visual_evidence: The bar chart appears inside the Oracle Analytics Desktop canvas with its surrounding toolbars and panels, not as a standalone image opened in an image viewer or web browser.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply create a dummy file using a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of Notepad or terminal editors (like vim/nano) being used to create a file named 'Brand_Analysis.dva' with fake or empty content.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must use the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset in Oracle Analytics Desktop. The expected output is a workbook saved exactly as 'Brand_Analysis.dva' in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\'. The task requires two specific calculated columns: 'Brand' (first word of Product Name) and 'City_Upper' (uppercase City). The final visualization must be a Bar Chart of Sales by Brand, with a filter applied for Product Category = 'Technology'.
